title: Common Type Definitions
description: Reusable type definitions for SIGHUP Kubernetes Fury Distribution schemas

Types.IpAddress.description: IPv4 address in dotted decimal notation (0.0.0.0 to 255.255.255.255). Example: 192.168.1.100

Types.Cidr.description: IPv4 CIDR notation (IP address with subnet mask /0-32). Example: 192.168.1.0/24

Types.Uri.description: Uniform Resource Identifier (URI). Must be a valid URL with scheme. Example: https://example.com:8080

Types.Fqdn.description: Fully Qualified Domain Name (FQDN). Must include domain suffix. Example: server.example.com

Types.MacAddress.description: MAC address in colon-separated hexadecimal format. Example: 52:54:00:12:34:56

Types.SshPublicKey.description: SSH public key in authorized_keys format. Supports RSA, ECDSA, Ed25519 key types.

Types.FilePath.description: File system path (absolute or relative). Example: /path/to/file or ./relative/path

Types.Email.description: Email address in standard format. Example: admin@example.com

Types.Duration.description: Duration in Go format (e.g., 1h30m, 24h, 720h). Valid units: h (hours), m (minutes), s (seconds)

Types.StorageSize.description: Storage size in Kubernetes format. Valid units: Gi, Mi, Ki, Ti. Example: 50Gi
